    🛡️ Privacy

    We never share your data with third parties. Saves instantly when toggled.

    Export

    Download account and stats data.

    Delete Account & Data

    Permanently delete all your data from The Tracker App. This action cannot be undone.

    Type username-Delete to confirm:

    Manage subscription status and plan actions.

    Integrate

    Available integrations populated from backend.

    Sheet

    Open your connected Google Sheet database.

    Open Sheet

    Calendar

    Your training schedule vs what you actually did. Tap any day for details.

    Your Shortcuts

    Turn any phrase into a /alias so you save typing.

    Personal Trainer

    See your current coach, athletes you train, or apply to become a coach.

    Groups

    Workout groups you've joined on iMessage, SMS, or Telegram.

    Find a group Create a group

    Run Clubs

    Local run clubs and online running communities you're a member of.

    Find a run club Start a run club

    Affiliate

    Referral performance and Stripe Connect Express payouts.

    Affiliate Program

    Earn commission for every paid subscriber you refer.

    Enter your legal details so we can send the affiliate agreement and unlock Stripe Connect once it is signed.

    ✓ Applied

    Once approved, this tab will show your referral metrics and Stripe onboarding state.

    Affiliate Agreement Required

    We emailed your affiliate agreement. Sign it before connecting Stripe.

    We will send the affiliate agreement to the confirmed email above.

    📧

    Verify Your Email

    Verify your email to unlock all features including affiliate access, data export, and account recovery.

    🛡️

    Help Improve TheTrackerApp?

    If you opt in, we learn from your logs to make food and workout estimates sharper — and to help you out if you get stuck.

    We never share your data with third parties. You can use everything normally either way, and change this anytime in the Setup tab under Privacy.
